howItWorks.intro: This tree planting offset calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Trees Needed
rules.explanation: Total offset divided by per-tree lifetime absorption.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much CO2 does one tree absorb?
faq.a: A mature tree absorbs about 48 lbs (0.022 tons) of CO2 per year on average.

faq.q: How many trees offset a person?
faq.a: About 700-800 trees to offset the average American's 16 tons/year footprint.

howWeCalculate.intro: This tree planting offset calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
